history.content:
<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while the goal is farther to the east in the same open corridor. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal without stepping onto lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead contains lava, so moving forward would be fatal. To avoid the lava, I should turn to inspect another direction and find a safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but the cells to my left and right are both open. Since I need to explore safely, I will turn right to face an open cell and continue navigating toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I should avoid it and turn to change direction before advancing toward the goal, which is visible ahead-right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The left and right nearby floor cells are safe, so I should turn to face one of them; turning right is a safe step that keeps me within open space.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe accessible option is to turn so I can avoid the lava and navigate around it toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing North. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but my immediate left and right are clear floor cells, while the visible area below shows walls blocking the way. Since I need to explore safely and forward may lead into unseen space, I will turn right to face an open side cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead contains lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe move is to turn so I can find a non-lava path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown from this view, but my immediate left and right are open floor cells. Since I need to explore safely and cannot see the goal yet, I will move forward into the cell ahead if it is clear.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but I’m inside a corridor with walls on both sides, and the only safe visible open path is to the left or right on my current row. Since I need to explore toward the goal while avoiding walls and lava, I’ll move forward to reveal what’s ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but the visible safe openings are to my left and right on the same row. Since I need to continue exploring safely and there is no goal in view, I should move toward a safe open cell rather than risk an unseen hazard ahead. Turning right will orient me toward the open cell on my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. To avoid it, I should turn to face a safe direction first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north, and the cell directly ahead is unknown in the local view, but the visible corridor around me is open. Since the goal is not currently visible, I should continue exploring safely by moving forward into the free space ahead rather than turning away.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing north, and the cell directly ahead is unknown, so moving forward is not clearly safe. My left and right are both open floor cells, but I need to continue exploring safely. I will turn right to face east and move toward the open space.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing East. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safest immediate action is to turn so I can avoid the lava and look for a safe route toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
